objective: Build a comprehensive public-source threat actor catalog for the Cyber Threat Dashboard.
scope: Named public threat groups and activity clusters from MITRE ATT&CK, Microsoft Threat Intelligence, Google Threat Intelligence/Mandiant, and MISP Galaxy.
normalization: Merge exact normalized names and aliases only; preserve similarity-only or disputed relationships as separate records.
limitations: No public source is exhaustive. Vendor cluster boundaries and attribution confidence differ.
